- Creator: Quaternius (`@Quaternius`)
- Official pack page: <https://quaternius.com/packs/animatedguns.html>
- Official source folder: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ICYTdMXQqhkhrh8Fzjx9D0ozJuONwtC4>
- License: CC0; see `LICENSE.txt`.
- Source format: FBX 7.4.
- Runtime conversion: Blender 5.1.1, glTF 2.0 binary, Y-up, animations retained.

The runtime files are converted derivatives. Their material colours, transforms and animation selection may be adapted in-engine without modifying weapon balance or authority.
